programmes.show_description: Emma's on the guest list! She's back for more birthday celebrations with a new launch of amazing and unique transfers, stickers, stamps and more.
Join us in welcoming the family-owned company, Lindy's Gang! Bursting with colour, creativity & fun, their sprays, powders and stamps are designed to inspire crafters.
Madhatters are known for their brilliant MDF & paper craft kits. Join Wendy for a fun, creative hour of crafting inspiration.
Join Ali for some fabulous birthday offers featuring £4 items and 40% offers on a range of mixed media materials, stamp sets, stencils, masks and more. Plus, enjoy a free gift!

HobbyMaker Repeats.
Lisa Lam joins us with a demo of her Frame Purse!
Equip your sewing space with the essential tools every maker relies on.
In her second hour, Lisa Lam brings us a Bag Boutique!
Storage4Crafts bring us two hours of storage solutions for your sewing room!
Storage4Crafts bring us two hours of storage solutions for your sewing room!
Join us for TEXT{ures} launch. Born from Lou's love of hand lettering and her lifelong passion for mixed-media, where marks, textures and layered details tell their own story.
Send your loved ones hand made cards with a touch of luxury with Hunkydory's Scalloped Foiled Edge Card Blanks. Ready to be decorated however you desire!
Keith is back to celebrate our 4th birthday with his signature mix of quality, quantity, and fun! Enjoy all-day P&P for just £4.95 and fill your basket with birthday treats galore!
Join us for TEXT{ures} launch. Born from Lou's love of hand lettering and her lifelong passion for mixed-media, where marks, textures and layered details tell their own story.
Say goodbye to large frayed colour charts and endless swatching. These PRISM Swatch Cards are the answer to your crafting prayers, the perfect resource to add to your stash!
A garden of papercraft beauty, the Floral Quilling Kit has everything you need to create 3D, quilled flowers, in one easy-to-use set. Discover more with Debby!

Join us for a day of Liberty! Suzie Duncan is with us to launch the latest Liberty collection - Emily Annabelle, alongside her Crossed Floral cushion kits.
Suzanne Campion joins us to demonstrate her beautiful Emily Annabelle Cathedral Window Quilt Kit.
Suzie Duncan brings us a celebration of Liberty inspired projects with the Tulip & Garden Path Bags.
Suzanne Campion is back with two fantastic projects. The Emily Belle inspired Chester Rows Quilt & the Mirliton Cushion.
Join us as we continue our celebration into Liberty and revisit past collections.
Celebrate 4 years of HobbyMaker with Studio Light in this exclusive birthday launch event.
Discover The Floral Stationery Collection by Françoise Read for Woodware. Create layered, textured and beautifully coordinated designs with ease.
